label: PolicyEngine nowcast of 2025 SPM thresholds — NOT a BLS publication
method: 50/50 blend of realized FCSUti-composite CPI aging and CE replication growth ratio, applied to the corrected 2024 base. Selected by backtest over 2020-2024 (see docs/bls-2026-correction.md): mean absolute error 1.35%/yr vs 2.23% for All-Items CPI-U aging.
caveats: BLS publishes actual 2025 thresholds ~September 2026; this nowcast is superseded the day they do.
2025 CPI annual averages are 11-month means (October 2025 release canceled during the federal shutdown).

All projection rules tested were biased low in 2022-2024 (real FCSUti consumption growth and in-kind benefit changes are not fully captured); the blend's backtest errors ranged -0.6% to -2.4% by year.
